pr.title: feat: Personal portfolio for Mazen Elsaka — Light Brain Network Theme
pr.body:
## Summary

Complete personal portfolio for Mazen Elsaka (Web Developer & AI Engineer focusing on Computer Vision) with a **light/white theme** featuring blue and purple neural network connections inspired by the human brain / CNN architecture.

**Theme:** White background with blue (#3b82f6) and purple (#8b5cf6) gradient accents, brain-like neural network canvas animation.

**Sections (8):**
1. Hero — Typing effect name, gradient text, focus badge
2. Timeline — Journey path with alternating cards and pulse nodes
3. Events — NASS Academy event cards with click-to-expand modals
4. Projects — Tech graph + filterable cards (All/Web/AI)
5. Code Editor — VS Code-style with 4 tabs (About, Skills, System Report, Challenges)
6. Skills — Category tabs with animated progress bars
7. Education — Credential cards with type icons
8. Contact — Form + social links

**Key Features:**
- Bilingual EN/AR with RTL support
- Canvas-based neural background (blue/purple nodes + synapses)
- Top navigation bar with active section detection
- Framer Motion animations throughout
- Fully responsive

## Review & Testing Checklist for Human

- [ ] Run `npm run dev` and navigate to `/portfolio` — verify light white background with blue/purple neural connections visible
- [ ] Test language toggle (EN ↔ AR) — text direction flips, content translates
- [ ] Click event cards to open modals — verify modal opens/closes
- [ ] Test project filter buttons (All/Web/AI) — cards filter correctly
- [ ] Scroll through all sections — verify no dark/green remnants from previous theme

### Notes
- MacOS Dock navigation has been completely removed per user request
- Replaced with standard top navbar with section links and active state
- The `PortfolioDock.tsx` file still exists but is no longer imported
- Build passes cleanly with `npm run build`

Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/766395dc19ff4c6fa5afb7cda3417e82
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
